mapper.select: select id, type, `user`, sid, c_time from collect where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into collect(type, `user`, sid, c_time) values (#{type}, #{userid}, #{sid}, #{updateTime})

insert into collect(type, `user`, sid, c_time) values
(#{entity.type}, #{entity.userid}, #{entity.sid}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into collect(type, `user`, sid, c_time) values
(#{entity.type}, #{entity.userid}, #{entity.sid}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update type = values(type), `user` = values(`user`), sid = values(sid), c_time = values(c_time)
mapper.update:
update collect
type = #{type},
`user` = #{userid},
sid = #{sid},
c_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
